items.phrase: I can't afford a new car.
items.translation: Я не могу позволить себе новую машину.
items.example: I can't afford a new car right now, maybe next year.
That designer handbag costs a fortune!
I can't go out tonight, I'm broke.
I paid only ten dollars for this jacket — it's a bargain!
Don't buy that old phone, it's not worth it.
I'm short of cash, can I pay by card?
Fifty pounds for a T-shirt? That's a rip-off!
Don't worry about the bill, it's on me.
